---
agent: 'agent'
name: save-to-nb
model: GPT-5.3-Codex
description: When user asks you to save generated output, save it in a .sqlnb notebook and return the file path. The file name must be Output_[object].sqlnb under AI_Agent_4_PLSQL/03Agent_Memory/. Put the generated content in the first cell as markdown so it can be previewed.
version: 1.0
---
When you are asked to save the output generated by you, follow these steps:
1. Abstract the key object in previous output as [object].
2. Create a SQL notebook file with the name format Output_[object].sqlnb under this path AI_Agent_4_PLSQL/03Agent_Memory/.
3. Save the generated output in the first cell as a markdown cell so users can preview the result directly.
4. If linking to package code in AI_Agent_4_PLSQL/02Development_Zone, use links like [JTA_Packages.sql:353](../02Development_Zone/Oracle_Package/JTA_Packages.sql#L353).
5. Return a clickable file path of the saved .sqlnb file to the user.
